# ACCENT
All you ever wanted
ACCENT
* [Highlights](https://www.hyundai.com/worldwide/en/cars/accent/highlights)
* [Design](https://www.hyundai.com/worldwide/en/cars/accent/design)

## Highlights
###  Big on style and features
The all-new ACCENT gives you everything you have ever wanted in a small family car and much more.
![Right side front view of silver accent and right side rear view of silver accent](https://www.hyundai.com/content/dam/hyundai/ww/en/images/find-a-car/pip/cars/accent-hc/accent-hc-highlights-right-side-front-view-silver-right-side-rear-view-silver-pc.jpg)
![Left side front view of silver accent](https://www.hyundai.com/content/dam/hyundai/ww/en/images/find-a-car/pip/cars/accent-hc/accent-hc-highlights-left-side-front-view-silver-pc.jpg)
### Sophisticated
Chrome detailing on the front grille and around the fog lamps take ACCENT to a higher level.
### Dynamic
Every details radiates dynamic tension and motion even though it is sitting still.
### Body structure
ACCENT’s super-strong body structure offers unparalleled protection. Critical areas are reinforced with ultra high-tensile strength steel so that ACCENT meets the very latest crash safety standards of the National Highway Traffic and Safety Administration of the United States.
### Smart trunk
Stand close to the trunk and in three seconds the lid opens automatically without pressing any key button. The smart trunk feature is easily deactivated at any time.
### Flat-folding 60:40-split rear seats
ACCENT's versatility is surprising: It can handle a mix of passenger and cargo hauling duties thanks to the flat-folding rear seats.
